{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Skysworn pin
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Skysworn]] inductees are given a green pin marked with a cloud to identify them.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
